name: typeui_setup_workflow
description: Set up the TypeUI MCP workflow according to the user's dashboard settings: verify TypeUI sign-in and usage, optionally return fundamentals setup, optionally return one TypeUI design skill package, and optionally start a section workflow.

designSystemSlug.description: Design skill slug to fetch. If omitted, the tool returns available choices.

installFundamentals.description: Deprecated compatibility flag. Dashboard MCP settings control automatic fundamentals setup.

promptRequest.description: Optional UI section request such as 'hero section' to resolve after setup.
